subtitle.zh: 人坐工位，魂游四海
subtitle.en: Body at work, soul elsewhere

description.zh: 你不是单纯偷懒，你是很懂得给精神留逃生通道。面对压力、流程、表格、会议，你总能在身体在线的情况下，让灵魂先出去透口气。你对「假装在忙」这件事，已经形成了近乎艺术的理解。
description.en: You're not just being lazy; you're an expert at giving your spirit an escape route. You can maintain a physical presence while your soul drifts away. Your understanding of 'pretending to be busy' has reached an artistic level.

subtitle.zh: 先发制人，再删为敬
subtitle.en: Send first, delete as courtesy

description.zh: 你是冲动表达和极速后悔的结合体。你的手往往比脑子快一步，消息先出去，灵魂后追上。但你并不慌，因为你相信：只要撤回够快，命运就追不上你。
description.en: You're a combination of impulsive expression and instant regret. Your hand is often faster than your brain. But you're not worried, because you believe: as long as you're fast enough to recall, fate won't catch up.

subtitle.zh: 不逼到最后，绝不启动天赋
subtitle.en: Talents activate only under pressure

description.zh: 你不是不会做，你只是必须等时间把你逼到墙角，才能激活真正的自己。越是死线逼近，你越容易进入一种诡异的高效状态。你平时像没启动，最后一刻像开了外挂。
description.en: You're not incapable; you just need to be cornered by time to activate your true self. The closer the deadline, the easier it is to enter a strange state of high efficiency.

subtitle.zh: 随机上线，礼貌失踪
subtitle.en: Randomly online, politely vanished

description.zh: 你的社交不是稳定在线，而是阶段性显灵。你可以突然出现，热情回应，制造一种「你一直都在」的错觉；也可以在下一秒礼貌蒸发，让所有人再次失去你的坐标。
description.en: Your social presence is not stable, but periodic. You can suddenly appear, respond enthusiastically, creating the illusion of 'always being there'; then politely evaporate the next second.

subtitle.zh: 别人一句话，你一整季
subtitle.en: One sentence from others, a whole season in your head

description.zh: 你的问题不是敏感，是想象力太有生产力。别人随口一句普通话，到你这里自动升级成悬疑、情感、职场、伦理多线并行剧。你不一定说出来，但你心里早已播完一整部连续剧。
description.en: Your problem isn't sensitivity; it's your productivity of imagination. A casual remark becomes a multi-plot series in your mind. You might not say it out loud, but you've already watched the whole drama.

subtitle.zh: 不是不努力，是选择性看开
subtitle.en: Not giving up, just selectively letting go

description.zh: 你很早就领悟了：很多事急也没用，不如先缓一缓。你身上有一种松弛到近乎超脱的气质。别人觉得你摆，你自己知道，这叫精神节能。
description.en: You learned early: many things aren't worth rushing, might as well slow down. You have an air of relaxation bordering on transcendence. Others think you're slacking, you know it's mental energy conservation.

subtitle.zh: 事情未必能成，氛围必须拉满
subtitle.en: Results may vary, but vibes must be maxed

description.zh: 你的人生功能之一，就是把现场从普通推进到热闹。你未必是最能解决问题的人，但你一定是最能让场面不尴尬的人。只要有你在，空气就会自动开始起伏。
description.en: One of your life functions is to elevate gatherings from ordinary to lively. You may not be the best problem-solver, but you're definitely the one who keeps things from getting awkward.

subtitle.zh: 表面无所谓，心里演唱会
subtitle.en: Outwardly unbothered, inward concert

description.zh: 你最擅长的事情之一，就是把在意伪装成不在意。你嘴上说「随便」「都行」「没事」，心里却已经开完一场带返场的情绪演唱会。你不轻易示弱，但情绪浓度其实很高。
description.en: One of your specialties is disguising caring as not caring. You say 'whatever', 'anything', 'it's fine', but inside you've already held a full concert with encores. You don't show weakness easily, but your emotional intensity is actually very high.

subtitle.zh: 白天没精神，晚上像开了挂
subtitle.en: No energy in day, unlocked mode at night

description.zh: 你和夜晚之间有一种近乎命定的合作关系。白天你像待机，晚上你才进入正式运行。别人是熬夜，你是夜间人格完全上线。
description.en: You have a seemingly fated relationship with the night. During the day you're on standby, at night you enter full operation mode. Others are staying up late, you're just fully activating your nighttime personality.

subtitle.zh: 方案做满分，执行看缘分
subtitle.en: Plans are perfect, execution is fate

description.zh: 你对「做计划」有天然热情。表格、流程、步骤、预案、备选项，这些东西能给你巨大安全感。你不是没有行动力，只是有时会把行动欲全部消耗在准备阶段。
description.en: You have a natural passion for 'making plans'. Spreadsheets, processes, steps, contingencies give you great security. You're not lacking in执行力, you just sometimes consume all your action energy in the preparation stage.

subtitle.zh: 不站队，只站前排
subtitle.en: No sides taken, just front row seats

description.zh: 你对八卦和戏剧现场有一种高度文明的围观热情。你不一定参与，但绝对关注；你不一定点评，但一定知道来龙去脉。你是那种能把「围观」做得既专业又优雅的人。
description.en: You have a highly civilized enthusiasm for gossip and drama. You may not participate, but you're definitely paying attention; you may not comment, but you definitely know the whole story.

subtitle.zh: 情绪一上头，灵感就自由
subtitle.en: When emotions rise, inspiration is freed

description.zh: 你身上有一种混乱但高产的创造力。理智时你不一定最能写，一旦情绪起来，你的表达、措辞、比喻和攻击力都会同步升级。你不是疯，你是灵感带电。
description.en: You have a chaotic but productive creativity. When rational, you're not necessarily the best writer, but once emotions rise, your expression, wording, metaphors and attack power all upgrade simultaneously.

subtitle.zh: 消息可以不回，世界依然运转
subtitle.en: Messages may go unanswered, world still spins

description.zh: 你对「离线」有天然的向往。不是讨厌人，而是太明白持续在线会消耗自己。你需要通过断联、放空、关通知，重新把精神捡回来。
description.en: You have a natural longing for 'offline'. It's not that you dislike people, but you understand too well that staying online drains you. You need to disconnect, zone out, turn off notifications to get your spirit back.

subtitle.zh: 每个都不错，所以一个也定不下
subtitle.en: Every option is good, so I can't choose any

description.zh: 你不是不会选，是你太容易看到每个选项的合理性。别人一秒能定的事，你能认真卡住半小时。你不是犹豫，你是在和无数个「也可以」长期共处。
description.en: You're not incapable of choosing, you just see the reasonableness in every option too easily. What others decide in one second, you can conscientiously get stuck on for half an hour.

subtitle.zh: 总能精准避开正确答案
subtitle.en: Precisely avoid the correct answer every time

description.zh: 你的人生不是没有好运，只是好运好像总会礼貌地从你旁边绕过去。你常常不是最惨的那个，但总能在关键时刻选中最微妙的错误路线。
description.en: Your life isn't without good luck, it's just that good luck seems to politely bypass you. You're often not the worst off, but you always pick the most subtly wrong route at critical moments.

subtitle.zh: 嘴一张开，世界进入实时评论
subtitle.en: Once mouth opens, world enters live commentary

description.zh: 你的语言系统不是用来存话的，是用来即时播报的。你天生适合点评、吐槽、接梗、总结和补刀。有你在，沉默会被打破，场面会被解说，细节会被放大。
description.en: Your language system isn't for storing words, but for live broadcasting. You're naturally suited for commenting, roasting, catching jokes, summarizing and finishing others' sentences.

subtitle.zh: 你不说话，但眼神已经写完八百字测评
subtitle.en: You don't speak, but your eyes have written an 800-word review

description.zh: 你是安静型高阶观察者。别人还在发言，你已经完成逻辑梳理、情绪判断、行为评级和翻车预估。你不一定参与，但你一定看得明白。你像现场最沉默的那个人，也像全场最清醒的阅卷老师。
description.en: You're a quiet high-level observer. While others are still speaking, you've completed logic sorting, emotional judgment, behavior rating and failure prediction. You may not participate, but you definitely understand everything.

subtitle.zh: 看似正常融入，实则偷偷带偏全场
subtitle.en: Appears normally integrated, actually secretly derails everyone

description.zh: 你是一种伪装得很好的搞事天才。你通常不会一上来就抢戏，但你总能在最恰当的时机，说出最歪的那一句，让原本正常的局，突然拐进喜剧频道。你不是显眼包，你是隐蔽型场面改写者。
description.en: You're a well-disguised troublemaking genius. You usually don't steal the show right away, but you can always say the most off-beat thing at the perfect moment, suddenly turning a normal situation into comedy mode.

subtitle.zh: 概率对你失效，好运对你生效
subtitle.en: Probability fails on you, luck works for you

description.zh: 你属于那种会让旁边人开始怀疑抽卡机制的人。别人看概率，你看命运偏爱；别人研究保底，你直接越过统计学。你不是每次都赢，但你赢的时候会让人觉得系统在偏心。
description.en: You're the kind of person who makes others start questioning the gacha mechanism. Others look at probability, you see fate's preference; others study pity systems, you skip statistics entirely.

subtitle.zh: 不是你太强，是概率被你玩坏了
subtitle.en: Not that you're too strong, probability is broken by you

description.zh: 你已经不属于「运气好」的范畴了，你更像是某种系统级异常。当别人还在讨论几率时，你的存在本身就像一个报错提示。你的结果不像抽出来的，更像卡出来的。
description.en: You've moved beyond the category of 'lucky', you're more like a system-level anomaly. While others are still discussing probability, your existence itself is like an error message. Your results don't look drawn, they look glitched.

subtitle.zh: 概率从不眷顾你，意外却总能精准降落
subtitle.en: Probability never favors you, but mishaps always precisely arrive

description.zh: 你的人生有一种很稳定的戏剧性：不是大灾大难，但总能在关键时刻精准接住一点小小的倒霉。你和「谢谢参与」之间，建立过长期而深厚的关系。你不一定最惨，但你总能把「差一点」活得很具体。
description.en: Your life has a very consistent drama: not major disasters, but always precisely catching some small misfortune at critical moments. You've built a long and deep relationship with 'Thank You For Participating'. You're not necessarily the worst off, but you always live 'just missed' very specifically.
